text.message: Knew you would do that as soon you said it red
im sorry but its too juicy
look on the brightside you walk away with two nice spots on the board left
could i have my wheat back
I got robbed 3 times already lol
ah that was my first time robbing you the bot chose white last time
Did it just roll 2 twice in a row :|
move it and i trade for an ore
Ok ill move for a wheat?
wheat for ore if you move it
He’s offering the “I didn’t plow you earlier” lol
I dont have it  but can give next one
why am i being soloed twice now
if your competing for army your not beating me and they win the game before you do blue
he has the most insane production
When you have 15 cards that don’t matter
that was just so poorly played dang
think that was game losing there
Blocking the 5 is a good block
if you nonbind ima just feed white tbh
hes too far ahead for you to be playing like this
not sure how im so far ahead
black has a city in hand
your competing with road and army
with a nonknight at that too
White is in such good position sheesh
i have only one ore black
if i pass white takes army
White with 4 down devs is scary
if you dont have atleast 2 knights in those 4 devs thats even worse
We gotta assume there’s two VPs there
i actually have pretty bad devs ull see
anything is good in your position
You can clearly see what I got
Blue gonna mess around and win lol
black please take road this next turn
Wow I should’ve left it lol
yea it might be gg black
I still gotta get two more points
Just because I’m at 8 yall are saying GG
Yall know that’s not how this works
im just playing i know its blue here
no one is helping you blue
blue u owe me a wheat
It was supposed to be the next 1
u didnt trade it to me
Sorry too late in the game as well
so messed up im in last
Dont worry ill beat u that last spot
I’m so confused as to what devs everyone has
i just pulled two more knights
i never lied about my devs
i had a vp and 2 yops
Wait red might actually have more VPs then I realized
No guys I have a knight lol
Idk what I’m doing I’m panicking lol
I have to city or VP for the win but that’s a stretch
i mean there are 3 more vps in the deck
or im trading the game to black
I don’t think blue is budging lol
then give me a wheaty blue
It won’t let me trade that lol
blue give him the wheat pls
Hahah what is this game hahaha
I think red has game lol
blue is so close to win lmfao
at least build 2 roads and a settle
